name: equilateral
Hint: An equilateral triangle has three equal sides.

name: isosceles
Hint: An isosceles triangle has two equal sides.

name: scalene
Hint: A scalene triangle has no equal sides.

name: right
Hint: A right triangle has one 90-degree angle.

name: obtuse
Hint: An obtuse triangle has one angle greater than 90 degrees.

name: acute
Hint: An acute triangle has all angles less than 90 degrees.
